title: Hornet Removal in St. George, Staten Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in St. George, Staten Island. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination near the Ferry Terminal & Waterfront. Call now for $350-$550 service.
intro: St. George residents dealing with aggressive hornets need fast, professional removal to protect their families and properties. Our experienced technicians provide safe hornet nest elimination throughout St. George, from the historic waterfront homes to modern residential buildings near the Staten Island Ferry Terminal. We offer reliable hornet removal services with transparent pricing from $350 to $550.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served St. George for years with certified technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of Staten Island's northeastern waterfront neighborhoods. We provide same-day emergency service, use eco-friendly treatments safe for families and pets, and guarantee complete hornet nest removal with follow-up protection.
localContext: St. George's mix of historic Victorian homes, contemporary condos near the waterfront esplanade, and residential buildings around the St. George Theatre creates varied nesting opportunities for hornets in eaves, porches, and landscaped areas. The neighborhood's proximity to the harbor and abundant green spaces in areas like Bank Street Commons makes professional hornet removal essential for safe outdoor enjoyment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in St. George?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout St. George, Staten Island. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest size and location. We prioritize emergency calls involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas around homes and businesses.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, safe disposal of the nest, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide upfront quotes before starting work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in St. George neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, St. George's waterfront location, mature trees, and mix of older and newer homes provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, especially during late summer and early fall. Properties near parks, the Esplanade, and tree-lined streets are particularly susceptible to hornet activity as they build nests in eaves, attics, and protected outdoor areas.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in St. George?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and the environment. Our licensed technicians wear protective equipment and establish safe perimeters during removal. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during the treatment, and the area is typically safe within 2-4 hours after service completion.
